rulings.Rulings: DEFNDANT ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER, MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFFS' COMPLAINT APPEARANCES:ROBERT K. LAWRENCE,ESQ. 510/832-8134 FOR DEFENDANT(ST.MARYS'S MED.CENTER)-MP DONALD C. SCHWARTZ,ESQ. 831/685-4700 FOR PLAINTIFF-OP RULING; PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WITHDRAWN HIS 170.1 CHALLENGE AGAINST JUDGE ROBETSON.( ALTHOUGH ROA INDICATED IT'S AGAINST JUDGE QUIDACHAY, ACTUALLY IT'S AGAINST JUDGE ROBERTSON PER PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL MANIFESTATION IN OPEN COURT).Argued and the court GRANT THE MOTION TO STRIKE PORTION OF THE COMPLAINT WITH 30 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO NEGLIGENCE CAUSE OF ACTION.Prevailing party to prepare order. (302/AJR/PB)JOYCE LONG # 8620
